summary: Tested P0 Bug Fix (React crash) and P1 Feature (Apply endpoint). Fixed critical route ordering bug in jobs.py. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: landing page loads, registration works, dashboard renders without crash.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in /app/backend/routes/jobs.py - /jobs/applications was defined AFTER /jobs/{job_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'applications' as a job_id
P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: Dashboard loads without React crash for new users
P0 Bug Fix VERIFIED: Landing page loads correctly
P1 Feature VERIFIED: POST /api/jobs/apply creates applications correctly
P1 Feature VERIFIED: GET /api/jobs/applications returns user's applications
P1 Feature VERIFIED: Duplicate application detection works (already_applied=True)
GET /api/jobs returns array without non-serializable objects (VERIFIED)
JobCard component in ParticulierView.jsx handles French/English keys correctly (VERIFIED)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Bug Fix and P1 Feature fully tested. Route ordering bug fixed in jobs.py - /jobs/apply and /jobs/applications now defined BEFORE /jobs/{job_id}. Backend tests: test_bug_fix_apply_feature.py covers auth flow, jobs endpoint, apply endpoint, applications endpoint, job matching, profile, and learning. Frontend: Dashboard loads without crash, JobCard handles French/English keys. Apply button feature ready for testing when job matches are available (requires CV upload to generate AI job matches).

p0_bug_fix: Landing page loads without React crash (PASSED)
Dashboard components render (metrics, CV section, jobs preview) (PASSED)
JobCard handles French keys (titre, secteur) and English keys (title, sector) (PASSED)
p1_apply_feature: POST /api/jobs/apply with valid token creates application (PASSED)

bug_fixed.issue: Route ordering bug: /jobs/applications was matched as /jobs/{job_id} where job_id='applications'
bug_fixed.impact: GET /api/jobs/applications was returning 404 'Offre non trouvée' instead of user's applications
